notes: Applied to every generative asset in inventories/media-asset.json — ONLY for products classified visual/experiential per references/media-pipeline.md. Item vars: tool (higgsfield|fal|elevenlabs), asset_class, format, budget (size/loudness/resolution), prompt, style_ref (dep ID of the style-bible/anchor task). The style-bible itself is a bespoke task created first.

steps.title: Generate {name}
steps.description: Generate {name} via {tool} using the prepared prompt and the style anchors from the style bible; produce {format} within budget {budget}.
acceptance_criteria: asset matches prompt spec and style anchors

steps.title: Post-process and optimize {name}
steps.description: Compress/transcode {name} to the delivery spec from 07-PERFORMANCE-PLAN.md (codecs, sizes, quality-tier variants where the plan requires them).

steps.title: Wire {name} into the product
steps.description: Place {name} at {path}, register it in the asset manifest, and connect it to its consuming surface; record license/provenance metadata.
acceptance_criteria: consuming surface uses the asset at runtime

steps.title: Runtime verification of {name}
steps.description: Verify {name} in the running product on the baseline device profile: loads, displays/plays correctly, honors the quality-tier ladder.
acceptance_criteria: verified in running product with evidence (screenshot/recording/log)
no budget regression on baseline profile
